idea-plugin.name: Advanced Language Injection
idea-plugin.description:
Advanced Language Injection adds configurable language injection to YAML, JSON, Properties, and other structured values that support IntelliJ language injection hosts. Rules are ordered, can target file names or file paths, support any registered IDE language, and can match prefixes either at the start of a value or anywhere inside it.

Important:
Injection works only in file types whose PSI elements support language injection (for example YAML, JSON, Properties and many other code / config formats). Plain text files (*.txt) are not supported, because IntelliJ Platform does not provide language injection hosts for them.
